message:
fix(model): case-insensitive Status/IssueType deser (beads_rust-enp5)

Add proptest coverage verifying that Status and IssueType deserialize
case-insensitively and produce stable content hashes regardless of
input casing. Covers round-trip, case variants, and custom value
preservation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
